overview.description: The Invesco Global ex-US High Yield Corporate Bond ETF (PGHY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund tracks market-value-weighted index of USD-denominated corporate debts from non-US issuers, rated below investment grade. The fund has no maturity limits or duration target in its selection process PGHY was launched on Jun 20, 2013 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: ICE USD Global High Yield ex-US Issuers Constrained Index
